title: StackUpper
description: Increase item stack with custom rule support!
body:
A NeoForge mod that allows changing item stacksize up to 2^31-1, with custom rules. 

# Scripting
https://github.com/MaiKokain/StackUpper/wiki/Scripting

## Note
*   Any incompatibility open an issue in [GitHub](https://github.com/MaiKokain/StackUpper/issues) or join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/UUdRC58Wku)
